name: Corpus Update → Profile Regeneration
description: Triggers profile regeneration whenever a corpus source is updated, then runs a fidelity check and notifies the configured channel.
assumptions: Profile IDs are stable identifiers known at instantiation time.
The notification channel is configured and reachable.
Fidelity thresholds are set appropriate to the use case.

config.message: Profile regeneration complete for corpus update. Fidelity threshold: {{minFidelityScore}}.

parameters.name: profileIds
parameters.description: List of profile IDs to regenerate when the corpus is updated.

parameters.name: minFidelityScore
parameters.description: Minimum acceptable fidelity score (0–1). Defaults to 0.75.

parameters.name: notificationChannel
parameters.description: Notification channel: email, slack, or webhook.
